selection_criteria.ranking_formula: ((0.4 × rating/5) + (0.3 × log(reviews)/5) + (0.2 × log(photos)/3) + (0.1 × keyword_bonus) + (0.15 × photo_limit_bonus)) × tourist_penalty × professional_stadium_penalty × sport_priority_penalty
selection_criteria.tourist_attraction_penalty: 15% penalty (0.85x) for tourist_attraction or park without identified_sports
selection_criteria.professional_stadium_penalty: 40% penalty (0.6x) for stadiums with >10,000 reviews (likely professional venues)
selection_criteria.sport_priority_penalty: 30% penalty (0.7x) for facilities with lacrosse. Priority sports: basketball, football, soccer, baseball, volleyball, track & field
